articles.author: Jon Gambrell, David Rising, Munir Ahmed, Aamer Madhani
articles.title: Iran receives a US ceasefire plan, officials say, as strikes batter the Middle East - AP News
articles.description: Officials say that Iran has received an American plan to pause the war in the Middle East. The proposal was sent even as Washington deploys paratroopers and more Marines to the region. Tehran did not confirm receiving the plan and publicly dismissed the diplo…
articles.content: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) Iran has received an American plan to pause the war in the Middle East, officials said Wednesday a proposal sent even as Washington deploys paratroopers and more Mari… [+7471 chars]
